title: Junior SEO Specialist at Blue Dart

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Blue Dart
jsonLd.description:
Blue Dart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Blue Dart:
Blue Dart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart!
